title: limnorchis × estesii
intro: Limnorchis × estesii, also known as the Estes' limnorchid, is a rare, hybrid orchid species that is endemic to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. While there is limited information available on the medicinal properties of this plant, it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it potentially useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Limnorchis × estesii are largely speculative, but it may help to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and protect against infection. As an herbal remedy, Limnorchis × estesii can be prepared as a tincture or salve, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
